questions.question: Explain System Design Implementation Steps Part 7B and its primary use case in System Design.
questions.answer: System Design Implementation Steps Part 7B provides a structured mechanism to handle core application logic cleanly.

questions.question: What are common mistakes developers make with System Design Implementation Steps Part 7B?
questions.answer: Common issues include scoping errors, unhandled boundary cases, and improper resource cleanup.

questions.question: How does the System Design runtime optimize System Design Implementation Steps Part 7B under the hood?
questions.answer: The runtime engine uses symbol tables, call stack frames, and bytecode optimization to run instructions efficiently.
